featured.title: 7-Eleven Data Breach Expose Franchise Applicants' Social Security Numbers: ShinyHunters Published Stolen Files - Tech Times

featured.suggestedTitle: 7-Eleven Breach Exposes Sensitive Data in SQL Injection Exploit
featured.suggestedSummary: 7-Eleven suffered a data breach where franchise applicants' Social Security Numbers were exposed by the ShinyHunters group. The breach is linked to a large-scale campaign exploiting a critical SQL injection vulnerability (CVE-2026-26980) in Ghost CMS. This incident underscores the importance of securing web applications against SQL injection attacks, which can lead to significant data exposure and potential identity theft.

featured.title: Microsoft、ゼロデイ 脆弱性のRedSun(CVE-2026-41091)とUnDefend(CVE-2026-45498)の緊急パッチを公開・YellowKey(CVE-2026-45585)は「緩和策のみ」|セキュリティニュースのセキュリティ対策Lab - 合同会社ロケットボーイズ
featured.summary: Microsoft、ゼロデイ 脆弱性のRedSun(CVE-2026-41091)とUnDefend(CVE-2026-45498)の緊急パッチを公開・YellowKey(CVE-2026-45585)は「緩和策のみ」|セキュリティニュースのセキュリティ対策Lab  合同会社ロケットボーイズ
featured.suggestedTitle: Microsoft Releases Emergency Patches for Zero-Day Vulnerabilities
featured.suggestedSummary: Microsoft has issued emergency patches for two zero-day vulnerabilities, RedSun (CVE-2026-41091) and UnDefend (CVE-2026-45498), which are being actively exploited. These vulnerabilities affect Windows systems and can lead to remote code execution and privilege escalation. Security teams should prioritize applying these patches to prevent potential exploitation and mitigate risks associated with these critical vulnerabilities.
